creator: bofh@redwerk.com
text:
On Thu, Nov 26, 2009 at 05:35:59PM +0200, Alexander Motin wrote:
> Please try to boot 8-STABLE or at least 8.0-RELEASE there.

I tried that - but with no luck. I downloaded recent sources of 8.0-PRERELEASE
with csup, built GENERIC kernel - but still no luck. 

"atacontrol list" shows only ad4 (hard disk) under enhanced SATA mode on ATA
channel 2

-- 
Eugene N Dzhurinsky
